snippet.title: Madonna & Sabrina Carpenter - Bring Your Love (Official Video)
snippet.description:
You're watching the official music video for 'Bring Your Love' by Madonna & Sabrina Carpenter. Original song taken from Madonna's Confessions On A Dance Floor: Part II, out July 3 2026.
- Stream ‘Bring Your Love’ now: https://madonna.lnk.to/bringyourlove 
- Pre-Order Confessions On A Dance Floor: Part II: https://Madonna.lnk.to/Confessions2 

Subscribe to the Madonna Channel! https://Madonna.lnk.to/YouTubeID 

Check out the Official Madonna YouTube Playlists…
The Complete Madonna Videography https://Madonna.lnk.to/Videography 
Live Performances https://Madonna.lnk.to/LiveYT 

Help Us Give Back…
Raising Malawi http://www.raisingmalawi.org/
The Ray of Light Foundation http://www.rayoflight.org/ 

Stay in touch with Madonna…
https://madonna.com
https://instagram.com/madonna
https://tiktok.com/@madonna
https://x.com/madonna
https://facebook.com/madonna
https://www.madonna.com/newsletter

Lyrics:
Ask yourself this
What are you doing it for?
Is it for you?
Is it for them?
I got something I wanna talk about

Don’t comment on my ideas 
I don’t want your judgment or your expectations 
Don’t wind me up like a toy
Your vision of me is a killer of joy 
I know where the bodies are buried 
Don’t try to shut me up 
Don’t try to distract me with numbers 
I did it all for love

Bring your love
Cause you cannot shake me 
Bring your love 
Cause you’ll never break me 
Bring your love
Cause you cannot take me down

Don’t rely on my moral compass 
On my discretion, I have a confession 
Don’t shove your fears down my throat 
Before I can speak, I can’t even breathe 
I know where the bodies are buried
Don’t try to shut me up
Don’t try to distract me with numbers
I did it all for love

Bring your love
Cause you cannot shake me
Bring your love
Cause you’ll never break me
Bring your love
Cause you cannot take me down
Bring your love
Cause you cannot shake me
Bring your love
Cause you’ll never break me
Bring your love
Cause you cannot take me down

Don’t wanna compromise
I made the sacrifice
I always pay the price
And now I don’t wanna. Don’t wanna
I have a confession
I did it all for love

Bring your love
Cause you cannot shake me 
Bring your love
Cause you’ll never break me 
Bring your love
Cause you cannot take me down 
Bring your love

snippet.title: Bande-annonce de lancement de la saison 3 : Dans la tanière du tigre | Overwatch
snippet.description:
Préparez-vous à entrer dans la tanière du tigre.

Un nouveau chapitre du règne de la Griffe s’ouvre avec l’arrivée de Shion, notre nouveau personnage de dégâts. Shion, l’aînée la plus terrifiante du clan Hashimoto, débarque sur le champ de bataille avec un arsenal redoutable composé de deux pistolets semi-automatiques et d’une moto avec laquelle elle peut écraser ses adversaires.

Combattez dans les rues de Tokyo sur la toute nouvelle carte Hybride, Neon Junction, remplie de clins d’œil à la culture japonaise et de références dans tous les coins. Tokyo prend également vie à travers notre nouvel évènement méta : Choc des avatars, où vous obtenez des récompenses selon le chemin choisi.

Mais ce n’est pas tout ! Déverrouillez des objets ornementaux inédits dans le passe de combat de la saison 3 et la boutique, comme le modèle mythique Illari phénix ascendant, le modèle d’arme mythique Rebelle de Tokyo pour Hanzo, de nouveaux modèles ultra avec des effets visuels supplémentaires, de nouveaux modèles issus de notre prochaine collaboration avec YOASOBI, et plus encore.

Découvrez tout ce qui vous attend dans la saison 3 : Dans la tanière du tigre à sa sortie DEMAIN.

#Overwatch est disponible en accès gratuit sur console et PC, y compris sur Nintendo Switch™ 2 !

► Dernières actualités d'Overwatch : https://overwatch.blizzard.com/fr-fr/
--
► Suivez Overwatch sur Twitter : https://twitter.com/OverwatchFR 
► Suivez Overwatch sur Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/OverwatchFR

snippet.title: FROM Saison 4 Épisode 9 trailer : Sophia révèle enfin qui elle est ?
snippet.description:
Le trailer de FROM saison 4 épisode 9 semble placer Sophia au centre de tout.

Elle demande à Clara si elle sait qui elle est réellement, affirme jouer à plusieurs jeux en même temps, et pourrait être sur le point de révéler son lien avec l’Homme en Jaune.

Pendant ce temps, Boyd semble prêt à lancer le plan le plus dangereux jamais tenté dans Fromville, Victor reçoit un nouvel avertissement du Garçon en Blanc et l’arbre à bouteilles pourrait cacher bien plus qu’un simple passage.

Dans cette analyse du trailer, on décrypte :

ce que Sophia cherche réellement à montrer à Clara ;
pourquoi son identité pourrait tout faire basculer ;
le rôle du Polaroid découvert par Elgin ;
et pourquoi Boyd pourrait tomber exactement dans le piège qu’elle prépare.

L’épisode 9 pourrait enfin révéler que Sophia ne manipule pas seulement les habitants : elle organise toutes les crises de la saison en même temps.

⚠️ Spoilers sur l’épisode 8.

#from #fromsaison4 #fromepisode9 #fromsaison4episode9 #fromseries #sophia #hommeenjaune #boyd #victor #fromtheorie

snippet.title: The Last House | Greta Lee and Wagner Moura | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
From director Louis Leterrier, starring Greta Lee and Wagner Moura. A family of four are suddenly sealed inside their home with no way out, and must work together to survive against both their dwindling resources and the mysterious, looming threat that is keeping them trapped.

THE LAST HOUSE is on Netflix August 7.

snippet.title: XBOX LA PURGE COMMENCE 🤯 Départs CHOCS, Fermeture de studios, licenciements... ÇA S'EMBALLE !!!
snippet.description:
Une semaine après un Xbox Game Showcase plutôt réussi, la réalité semble déjà rattraper Microsoft. Départs majeurs chez Xbox Game Studios, studios menacés, fermetures possibles, indépendance forcée, tensions autour de Ninja Theory, Double Fine, Compulsion Games ou encore Arkane… le contraste est brutal.

Pendant des années, Xbox a multiplié les rachats, les promesses, le Game Pass Day One et les discours sur la créativité. Mais aujourd’hui, Microsoft réclame du concret : rentabilité, ventes, retour sur investissement. Et quand Satya Nadella explique qu’il faut rendre Xbox économiquement viable, le message est limpide.

Alors que plusieurs jeux salués n’ont visiblement pas transformé l’essai commercialement, une question se pose : Xbox peut-il encore protéger ses studios créatifs ? Ou assiste-t-on au début d’une purge historique ?

🎥 Movie Concept Summary
A powerful storm appears without warning over major cities around the world. Instead of snow, strange black particles begin falling from the sky. As people unknowingly inhale the mysterious substance, they begin suffering violent symptoms before transforming into aggressive, flesh-hungry zombies.

Within hours, civilization collapses. Entire cities become war zones as the infection spreads faster than anyone can contain. Governments fall, communication networks fail, and billions disappear into chaos.

Amid the destruction, Dwayne Johnson survives the outbreak and begins a desperate search for his missing family. Traveling through ruined cities, abandoned highways, and zombie-infested wastelands, he encounters other survivors struggling to stay alive in a world consumed by the undead.

As the black storm continues spreading across the planet, he discovers that the outbreak may be connected to something far more terrifying than a virus. With humanity on the brink of extinction, he must lead a group of survivors through impossible battles to reunite with his family before the world is lost forever.

snippet.description:
i-dle (아이들) 'Crow' Official Music Video

[🎧] [Crow]
🔗 https://i-dle.lnk.to/Crow

Composed by Mortal, Jumal of SMGS 
Lyrics by 소연 
Arranged by Mortal, Jumal of SMGS

=======

[Lyrics]

어린 까마귀의 Bluffin 
No 어른이 된 새의 Proving 
저 불운은 본디 행운의 주인을 
가려내려는 시험인 듯이 
피가 말라도 마치 고고한 척 
향이 좋은 돈은 No doubt 
God blessed me yeah with a 감옥 
형기 내내 쓸개를 핥아 
 
I can’t forget it 
나 어디서 태어난 지 
못 갖춘 둥지 위에도 굴하지 
않고 부모덕 없이 큰 몸뚱어리 
때부터 시련은 적 아닌 우 
박수는 떠나보내려는 수법 
함부로 즐기단 평생 놀 테니 
정신들 똑바로 차리고 웃어 
 
Come on omen do what you do best 
We are born in the nest of the Crow 
We the omen do what we do best 
Keep chasing the glow 
Until it cuts my tongue 
 
Pay the paper not the people 
늘 갈고닦고 배워 
엔딩엔 인맥은 개뿔 
공짜로는 Never ever 
본질에 대한 탐욕은 멈추는 순간 도태되어 
관심 밖을 맴돌다 헛된 걸 가꿔 
 
I don’t talk too much my ad’s right there 
I don’t talk too much my fans are right there 
I don’t seek the 
I don’t need the 
I don’t trust 운 난 더 취급 안 해 
 
We want the boss, we still want more 
We want the crown, born as the hungry Crow 
We want the boss, we still want more 
We want the crown, born as the hungry Crow 
 
Come on omen do what you do best 
We are born in the nest of the Crow 
We the omen do what we do best 
Keep chasing the glow 
Until it cuts my tongue 
 
Yeah baby once we were too deep in our own haze 
Lost in the fog we made, forgetting our way, 
no way umm umm 
우린 다시 물을 엎질러 맞춘 질서를 어질렀고 
우린 우릴 앞질러 날아가려고 더 위로 
We’re locked in for real, so what you wanna do 
 
Out the flock, underdog으로 랭커도 TKO 
No stardom no money 
우린 벨트를 목표로 
배우고 배워 그 끝은 
성공 아닌 포기까지 
Keep coming back omen 
겨우 이 정도론 못 당하지 
 
Come on omen do what you do best 
We are born in the nest of the Crow 
We the omen do what we do best

Hidden worlds behind my eyes

One sign

Version buried deep inside

One flame
Everything is rearranged

One sound
Feel the universe around

Stained soul
We were never broken down

snippet.title: Kalbim Sensiz Üşüyor | Murat Yavuz | Kalbe Dokunan Şarkılar | Official Music
snippet.description:
🥀 Kalbim Sensiz Üşüyor | Söz-Müzik: Murat Yavuz (Kalbe Dokunan Şarkılar)

Bazı ayrılıklar vardır...
Zaman geçer, mevsimler değişir, insanlar gider...
Ama kalbin bir köşesinde hep aynı sızı kalır.

"Kalbim Sensiz Üşüyor"; sevdiği insanın ardından yalnızlıkla baş başa kalan bir yüreğin hikâyesini anlatıyor. Yağmurlu geceler, unutulmayan hatıralar, kapanmayan yaralar ve hâlâ bitmeyen bir sevdanın sesi...

Bu şarkı; unutamayanlara, bekleyenlere, hâlâ bir dönüş umudunu kalbinde taşıyanlara ithaf edilmiştir.

🎵 Dinlediğiniz için teşekkürler.
❤️ Beğenmeyi, yorum yapmayı ve kanala abone olmayı unutmayın.
